summary: Clear‑sounding source captures a solid show highlighted by a strong Help > Slip > Franklin’s sequence.
review: The recording is praised as one of the best sounding sources in the collection, offering clear and well‑balanced audio. The performance itself is described as solid, with the Help > Slip > Franklin’s segue standing out, though reviewers note that the following night was considered even better.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is viewed as decent (3‑star comment) while the recording quality is rated highly (4‑star praise); weighted average yields a good overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound is clear, well‑balanced and considered one of the best‑sounding sources among similar recordings.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall solid performance; reviewers felt it held up well, though they hinted the next night’s show was superior.
